Name: Scorpocalypse
Title: Eremite Scorching Loremaster: Scorpocalypse
Source: Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge against the Eremite Scorching Loremaster at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives in a Friendly Fracas

Talent.Name: Scorpocalypse
Talent.Desc:
$[K1]: When your active character is <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A2303]</color>, equip this card.
After $[A2303] equips this card, immediately use <color=#FFD780FF>$[S23033]</color> once.
<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C123031]</color> created by $[A2303] with this card equipped will deal +1 DMG in Rounds when $[A2303] has used a <color=#FFFFFFFF>Normal Attack</color> or <color=#FFFFFFFF>Elemental Skill</color>.
<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C123031]</color>'s DMG reduction effect can now be triggered twice per Round.
(Your deck must contain $[A2303] to add this card to it)

K1.Name: <color=#FFFFFFFF>Combat Action</color>
K1.Desc: After you finish 1 Combat Action, it will be your opponent's turn.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>Playing a card from your Hand with this rule is also a Combat Action rather than a Fast Action</color>.

C123031.Name: Spirit of Omen: Pyro Scorpion
C123031.Desc:
<color=#FFFFFFFF>End Phase:</color> Deal 1 $[K103].
<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]: 2</color>

<color=#FFFFFFFF>When entering play, when the Action Phase starts:</color> Attach $[C123033] to your $[A2303]. (When $[C123031] is in play, the character will take -1 DMG, once per Round.)

K103.Name: {SPRITE_PRESET#2103}<color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG</color>
K103.Desc:
Applies {SPRITE_PRESET#2103}Pyro and can trigger the following Elemental Reactions:
{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}{SPRITE_PRESET#2101}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Melt</color>: DMG +2 for this instance
{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Vaporize</color>: DMG +2 for this instance
{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Overloaded</color>: DMG +2 for this instance, the target is forcibly switched to the next character
{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}{SPRITE_PRESET#2107}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Burning</color>: DMG +1 for this instance, creates a [<color=#FFFFFFFF>Burning Flame</color>] that will deal 1 Pyro DMG at the end of the Round (Takes effect once, max 2 stacks)

K3.Name: <color=#FFFFFFFF>Usage(s)</color>
K3.Desc: After this card's effect is triggered, 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Usage</color> of it will be consumed.\nThis card will be discarded immediately once it has 0 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Usages</color> remaining.

C123033.Name: Pyro Scorpion: Guardian Stance
C123033.Desc: When <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C123031] is on the field: </color>the equipping character takes -1 DMG. (Once each Round)
